Header: Purple background with "Team Generation" logo (yellow trophy) and "Associated with Believer01".  
Main heading: "Contact Us".  
Key text (first 200 chars): "We are committed to providing reliable service. If you have any questions, feedback, or need support, please reach out to us using the contact details below. Support & General Inquiries For the fastest response, please email us directly: Email: believer01.official@gmail.com Address & Operations Team Generation is an online service operating under Indian laws. *We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours."  
Footer: "Developed By Believer01 [YouTube icon] Refer your friends for benefits".  
Layout: No build error or broken layout.
